'''鈭歾-r-ch-j''' ('''kazarchejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teen|teen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teen|teen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-r-ch-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazarchejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizarchejoko|thizarchejoko]] || [[word:jizarchejoko|jizarchejoko]] || [[word:shizarchejoko|shizarchejoko]] || [[word:kizarchejoko|kizarchejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
